fields.acceptance_criteria: Tab bar matches original styling (32px height, icons, close buttons, hover/active states); sidebar file tree matches original (sort/filter, load/empty states, collapsible sections); both sidebar and right panel are resizable via drag handles; minimum/maximum width constraints on panels
fields.title: Feature: UI polish — tab bar, sidebar, and resizable panels

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Tab bar: 32px height, icon + label per tab, active tab with accent bottom border, horizontal scroll with hidden scrollbar. Fixed tabs (Logs, Hypergraph, Settings) — no close buttons. 2. Sidebar: TreeView with 8px-per-level indentation, chevron expand/collapse (90deg rotate), colored folder/file icons, header with title + count badge. 3. ResizeHandle component: mousedown/mousemove/mouseup with rAF-batched delta, col-resize cursor on body during drag, user-select:none prevention, horizontal direction. 4. Sidebar width driven by signal, connected to ResizeHandle, default 260px. 5. Sidebar collapse toggle button. 6. TreeView component ported to viewer-api-leptos shared crate (reusable across doc-viewer, ticket-viewer). 7. No right panel or CodeViewer in this ticket.
fields.interview_answers: Q1: Tabs are fixed (Logs, Hypergraph, Settings) — not closeable. No close buttons needed. Q2: Sidebar shows file tree of loaded log sources, same as TS version. TreeView component should be ported to viewer-api-leptos shared crate. Q3: Right panel (CodeViewer) left entirely to T5 — this ticket only handles sidebar + tab bar + resize.
fields.title: Feature: UI polish — tab bar, sidebar, and resizable panels
